name: Earnings Review
description_en: Deep-read an earnings report through the four-masters lens: business quality, moat, management, and valuation, with first-hand data cross-checks.
description_zh: 以四大师视角深度精读财报：生意质量、护城河、管理层与估值，交叉验证一手数据。
long_en: One skill from the AI Berkshire value-investing collection. It dissects a quarterly or annual earnings report using Buffett, Munger, Duan Yongping, and Li Lu's frameworks, cross-checks figures with local tools, and outputs a buy/hold/sell signal.
long_zh: AI Berkshire 价值投资技能集之一。用巴菲特、芒格、段永平、李录的框架拆解季度或年度财报，使用本地工具交叉核对数字，并输出买入/持有/卖出信号。
sec_note_en: Runs local Python tools from tools/ and performs web searches for earnings filings. No external accounts required; verify figures against primary filings.
sec_note_zh: 会运行 tools/ 下的本地 Python 工具，并为财报文件执行网络搜索。无需外部账号；请与原始文件核对数字。
